prompt:
Ultra-premium K-pop comeback concept featuring a four-member global girl group embodying luxury chaos, emotional power, and futuristic femininity.

The album visual identity blends:

Cyberpunk neon nights + high fashion couture
Watercolor ink sketch fusion with hyper-real lighting
Global city symbolism (Seoul × Tokyo × Paris × NYC)
Themes: power, fame, identity, rebellion, elegance

Each member represents a “realm" :

The Flame (Red / Power / Stage dominance)
The Mirror (Silver / Mystery / Emotionless beauty)
The Bloom (Pink / Soft power / Charisma)
The Storm (Blue / Control / Cool intensity)

Typography: sharp luxury serif + glitch distortion
Color language: neon magenta, black obsidian, electric blue, chrome gold
Mood: “Runway meets apocalypse + idol goddess energy”
